zh.Broadbottom, Cheshire, England: 英國爾布洛阿德波特姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Woley於1395年1月出生在英國英格蘭爾時，他的父親Robert de Woley40歲，母親Agnes Woolley25歲。他於1434年之前與Joane Kriton在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1461年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Broadbottom, Cheshire, England: 英国爾布洛阿德波特姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Woley于1395年1月出生在英国英格兰爾时，他的父亲Robert de Woley40岁，母亲Agnes Woolley25岁。他于1434年之前与Joane Kriton在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1461年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Woley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Boleslaw, Halina, Janusz, Krzysztof, Lech, Stanislaw.
Polish: from a pet form of a personal name such as Wolimir (see Wolak ).
Polish (Wołek): nickname from wołek ‘little bullock’, or possibly a metonymic occupational name for someone who looked after bullocks.

variants.name: Wolak
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Ludwik, Andrzej, Casimir, Genowefa, Janusz, Jaroslaw, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Piotr, Teofil.
Polish: patronymic from a short form of a personal name, such as Wolimir, based on the Slavic element vol ‘to want’ (from Old Slavic voliti, Polish woleć).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Woley was born in January 1395, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Woley, was 40 and his mother, Agnes Woolley, was 25. He married Joane Kriton before 1434, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1461, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Woley est né en janvier 1395, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Woley, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Woolley, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Joane Kriton avant 1434, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1461, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Woley im Januar 1395 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Woley 40 und seine Mutter Agnes Woolley 25. Er hat vor 1434 in England, United Kingdom Joane Kriton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1461 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Woley è nato il nel gennaio 1395 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Woley, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Woolley, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Joane Kriton prima del 1434, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1461, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Moterham, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.Broadbottom, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアブロアドボットオム
ja.Broadbotham, Moterham, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: John de Woleyが1395年1月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Woleyは40歳，母Agnes Woolleyは25歳であった。1434年以前にイギリスイギリスでJoane Kritonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1461年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Woley(이)가 1395년 1월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Woley(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Woolley(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1434년 이전 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joane Kriton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Woley nasceu em janeiro de 1395, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Woley, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Woolley, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane Kriton antes 1434, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1461, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Woley родился январь 1395 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Woley было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Woolley, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane Kriton перед 1434 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1461 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Woley nació en enero de 1395, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Woley, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Woolley, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Joane Kriton antes de 1434, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1461, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
